meta.game: Utah Jazz at Los Angeles Lakers

UTAH.headline: NBA offseason 2026: Draft, free agency, trade targets for every team
UTAH.description: Summer is here for 10 franchises that missed the postseason. What lies ahead for Milwaukee, Dallas and each eliminated team?

UTAH.headline: Utah faces Los Angeles on 9-game road slide
UTAH.description: Utah Jazz (21-59, 15th in the Western Conference) vs. Los Angeles Lakers (52-29, fourth in the Western Conference)

UTAH.headline: Hinson scores a career-high 30 as the Jazz snap a 10-game skid with win over the Grizzlies
UTAH.description: — Blake Hinson scored a career-high 30 points, John Konchar and Bez Mbeng had triple-doubles, and the Utah Jazz beat the short-handed Memphis Grizzlies 147-101 on Friday night.

UTAH.headline: Memphis Grizzlies vs. Utah Jazz: Game Highlights
UTAH.description: Memphis Grizzlies vs. Utah Jazz: Game Highlights

UTAH.headline: Jazz face the Grizzlies on 10-game skid
UTAH.description: Memphis Grizzlies (25-55, 12th in the Western Conference) vs. Utah Jazz (21-59, 15th in the Western Conference)

LAL.headline: Utah faces Los Angeles on 9-game road slide
LAL.description: Utah Jazz (21-59, 15th in the Western Conference) vs. Los Angeles Lakers (52-29, fourth in the Western Conference)

LAL.headline: Which NBA father-son duos have the most points?
LAL.description: In 2024, Bronny James joined his father LeBron on the Los Angeles Lakers. Take a closer look at the highest-scoring father-son duos in NBA history.

LAL.headline: Phoenix Suns vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights
LAL.description: Phoenix Suns vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights

LAL.headline: LeBron James scores 28, leads Lakers past Suns 101-73 to clinch home-court advantage in 1st round
LAL.description: — LeBron James had 28 points, 12 assists and six rebounds, and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers clinched home-court advantage in the first round of the playoffs with their 101-73 victory over the Phoenix Suns on Friday night.

LAL.headline: LeBron drops 28 points, dishes 12 assists in Lakers' win
LAL.description: LeBron drops 28 points, dishes 12 assists in the Lakers' win over the Suns.
